# Tidy Finance

> An opinionated approach on empirical research in financial economics

## Pages

- [Tidy Finance Blog](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/index.llms.md)
- [Using DuckDB with WRDS Data](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/using-duckdb-with-wrds/index.llms.md)
- [Replicating Gu, Kelly & Xiu (2020)](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/gu-kelly-xiu-replication/index.llms.md)
- [Convert Raw TRACE Data to a Local SQLite Database](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/convert-raw-trace-data/index.llms.md)
- [The legacy pandas edition of Tidy Finance with Python (unmaintained archive)](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/legacy-python-pandas/index.llms.md)
- [High-Frequency Market Data: lobsteR and 20 Years of SPY on Hugging Face](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/hf-and-hugging-face/index.llms.md)
- [lobsteR package and high-frequency data](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/hf-and-lobster/index.llms.md)
- [CIR Model Calibration using Python](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/cir-calibration/index.llms.md)
- [Tidy Market Microstructure](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/tidy-market-microstructure/index.llms.md)
- [Tidy Finance migrates from SQLite to Parquet](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/sql-legacy-version/sql-legacy-version.llms.md)
- [ISS Shareholder Proposals](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/iss-shareholder-proposals/index.llms.md)
- [Construction of a Historical S&P 500 Total Return Index](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/historical-sp-500-total-return/index.llms.md)
- [CRSP 2.0 Update](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/crsp-v2-update/index.llms.md)
- [Comparing Fama-French Three vs Five Factors](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/fama-french-three-vs-five-factors/index.llms.md)
- [Non-Standard Errors in Portfolio Sorts](https://blog.tidy-finance.org/posts/nse-portfolio-sorts/index.llms.md)
